title: BASF Partners With Plug Power to Deploy Purification Solutions in Their Advanced Hydrogen Liquefaction Plants
content: BASF announced the signing of a Cooperation Agreement with Plug Power, positioning BASFâ€™s advanced DeOxo catalysts as an offer within Plug Powerâ€™s hydrogen liquefaction plants globally to enhance their market offerings, improving reliability and cost efficiency. The primary focus of this collaboration is on hydrogen liquefaction plants with capacities of 30, 60, and 90 tons per day.
author: Analysts Account
